title: TidyZ 150 Pack Freezer Bags 22cm x 28cm – Clear Plastic Food Storage Bags for Freezing, Sandwiches & Meal Prep
features: 150 Pack – Everyday Kitchen Essential: Includes 150 clear freezer bags (22cm x 28cm), perfect for daily food storage, meal prep, and household use. Ideal for families and busy kitchens.
Multipurpose Food Storage: Great for storing sandwiches, fruit, vegetables, meat, baked goods, and leftovers. Also useful for organising pantry items and separating portions.
Freezer Safe Protection: Designed for freezing food safely and hygienically. Helps keep ingredients fresh and protected during storage.
Clear & Practical Design: Transparent plastic makes it easy to identify contents at a glance, helping you stay organised in your fridge or freezer.
Convenient & Disposable: Lightweight and easy to use, perfect for quick food storage at home, school lunches, picnics, or travel.
description: Keep your kitchen organised and your food fresh with TidyZ Freezer Bags 150 Pack. Each pack includes 150 clear food storage bags measuring 22cm x 28cm, providing a practical solution for everyday storage needs. Whether you're freezing meat, storing vegetables, packing sandwiches, or preparing ingredients in advance, these versatile freezer bags make food organisation simple and hygienic. The clear design allows you to easily see contents without opening the bag, saving time and reducing waste. Suitable for fridge and freezer use, they are ideal for meal preparation, leftovers, lunch packing, and general household storage. Perfect for busy households, catering environments, and daily kitchen use, TidyZ freezer bags offer a convenient and cost-effective food storage solution.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Cooking, Dry, Freeze Dried, Frozen, Refrigerate
